title: Epic Fight - Rapier Moveset Addon
description: Rapier moveset for the mod EpicFight
body:
![Rapier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc398102881243c13da7f3f283a9f64d1dde9ec.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------

### MAIN THINGS THE MOD ADDS:

- 4 Rapier moveset with his own animations on almost everything, including new parry.
- 7 Rapier weapons from Iron to Netherite and 3 new tiers to craft.
- 3 New items to craft the Enderite, Oceanite, and Witherite tier.
- 1 Special mixed moveset for the rapier on Ironspellbooks, we all like magic

-----------------------------------------------------------
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YWDuqdI30NY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-----------------------------------------------------------


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### FAQ:

**Will this mod be backported to 1.19.2 or 1.18.2 or 1.16.4?**


No, sadly i dont have the time and motivation to port it to thoose versions and most people prefer to play on 1.20.1, and in the future with newer versions this 1.20.1 could be the actual 1.19.2 in terms of people.

**Where can i get the new rapier tiers?**

You need to craft them, each one requiring (for vanilla method) defeating each boss of the game, depending on what tier category you want, i recommend using JEI for the recipes.

**Can i use this mod on a modpack?**

Yes, you can use this mod on modpacks and make datapacks with it as you want.

**How can this mod work with (Insert weapon mod name)**

You can make weapons use rapier movesets with a datapack on weapon capabilities, all of this explained in this wiki page.

</details>
